features: 【PROTECT AND STABILIZE YOUR WRIST】The ergonomic wrist brace provides the needed support for injured wrists. Relieve wrist pain, broken wrist, wrist sprain, repetitive stress injury or rheumatoid arthritis, maintaining all movement of wrist and fingers.

【ULTIMATE COMFORT】Lightweight durable material with moisture-wicking and sweat-resistant properties for all-day comfort while working and sleeping. The compression wristband retains therapeutic heat to improve circulation and promote healing. The wrist support allows you to easily carry out your daily activities.

【FIRM AND ADJUSTABLE】Double seam and laser trim create a comfortable wearing experience. The adjustable design perfectly fits the unique shape of your left and right hands, providing you with enough support and fixation, reducing the pressure on the tendons, suitable for most hand shapes.

【LIGHTWEIGHT AND FLEXIBLE】Unlike traditional wrist splints, there are no metal bars to avoid any restriction on the natural movement of the wrist. Great for sports and those who find metal bars uncomfortable. Can be used left or right hand, unisex.

【MULTI PURPOSE】ACWOO wrist brace has obvious effect on arthritis, carpal tunnel, thumb base arthritis, tendinitis or tendinopathy, ganglion cyst. Also great for sports, fitness, basketball, volleyball, tennis, weightlifting, gardening, housework and more.
description: Product Description ACWOO Wrist Brace 1. The fabric is soft and comfortable, and the inner layer is made of breathable fabric to absorb moisture and facilitate perspiration. 2. The wrist brace provides great support for the wrist, and it will not limit your finger movements. 3. Unisex, one size fits all. Specification Material: Polyester Package: 2 x Wrist Brace
